leads.issues: A Google site-search on vulcanironworks.net (no www) returns only the /about and /contact pages, while the same search on www.vulcanironworks.net returns the homepage and the /recreational-vehicles-rvs page instead, with almost no overlap between the two result sets. This is the classic signature of a missing 301 redirect (or canonical tag) between the www and non-www versions of the domain - Google is indexing them as two separate, only-partially-indexed properties instead of one consolidated site.
leads.opportunity: A single 301 redirect (or canonical tag) from the non-preferred domain version to the preferred one consolidates all existing search authority into one property instead of splitting it in half - a same-day fix. Vulcan also already offers a genuinely uncommon niche, RV metal fabrication, that has just one page and could be built out to own that specific search instead of competing only on generic 'ironworks' terms.
